description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded dome that covers the top and sides of the head, with a pronounced angular brow and a T-shaped opening at the front for the face. The front faceplate extends downward, providing coverage for the nose and cheeks, while the sides curve back to protect the ears. The rear of the helmet is rounded and extends slightly downward to shield the back of the head. The surface is uniformly smooth and appears to be made of a hard, metallic or composite material, with no visible seams, fasteners, or decorative elements. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or retention systems, giving the helmet a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A smooth, rounded helmet with a T-shaped face opening and full head coverage, featuring a minimalist, seamless design in a solid color.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped face opening and angular brow, with the helmet's smooth dome and cheek coverage clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet's continuous curve from the dome to the back, with the side faceplate extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back of the helmet, showing its full head coverage and lack of openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the helmet's smooth, uninterrupted surface and protective side extension.
